roles.description: Maintains the charter, invariants, frozen surface, schemas, decisions, SPEC, and the root contract.
Owns work items and their lifecycle transitions, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.
Owns evidence run manifests and reproducibility records.
Owns validators, generators, tests, and CI automation.
Owns the Diataxis documentation set under docs/ (tutorial, how-to guides, explanation).

concurrency.note: When true, no two non-terminal (active/blocked) work items may share an owner or affected scope. Adopters with multiple concurrent agents should enable this.
